top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad';
